##NAMES=Zhanghuifenite
##RRUFFID=R160030
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_3_Mn^2+^_4_Mg_2_Al(PO_4_)_6_
##LOCALITY=Santa Ana pegmatite, Totoral pegmatitic field, Coronel Pringles Department, San Luis, Argentina
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Jaroslav Hyršl
##DESCRIPTION=Dark green massive in veinlets, associated with beusite and lithiophilite. Type sample
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R160030
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_2.80_Ca_0.11_)(Mn_3.09_Fe^2+^_0.47_Mg_0.36_)(Mg_1.31_Fe^2+^_0.69_)(Al_0.81_Fe^3+^_0.19_)(PO_4_)_6_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.8926 b: 12.4658 c: 10.9178 alpha: 90 beta: 97.92 gamma: 90 volume: 1737.93 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
